sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_intervals (id, event_time) VALUES (1, NOW() + INTERVAL 5 HOUR);
SELECT id, epoch(event_time - NOW()) AS seconds_ahead FROM test_intervals;
UPDATE test_intervals SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL 2 HOUR WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, epoch(NOW() - event_time) AS seconds_behind FROM test_intervals;
